highlights.text: Tokyo → Mt. Fuji → Kyoto → Osaka Golden Route family circuit
Private sushi masterclass & TeamLab Planets skip-the-line
First-class Shinkansen bullet train with luggage forwarding
Fushimi Inari, Golden Pavilion & Dotonbori street food

itinerary.title: Japan Highlights Family Tour
itinerary.tagline: Tokyo • Mt. Fuji • Shinkansen • Kyoto • Osaka
itinerary.overview: Step into a world where ancient traditions blend with ultra-futuristic innovations on TRAGUIN's curated family heritage expedition. Connecting Tokyo's neon high-rises, Kyoto's timeless shrines, and Osaka's culinary streets — with private executive vans, first-class Shinkansen, skip-the-line admissions, and 24/7 bilingual concierge support.
itinerary.seo_title: JP-001 | Japan Highlights Family Tour | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 06 Nights / 07 Days Japan family package (JP-001): Tokyo, Mt. Fuji, Hakone, Kyoto, Osaka, sushi masterclass, and Shinkansen bullet train.

days.title: Arrival in Tokyo & Neon Initial Exploration
days.description: Premium airport reception at Narita or Haneda. Private luxury van to central hotel. Evening orientation walk through Shinjuku or Shibuya and the famous Shibuya Scramble.
activities: Sightseeing Included: VIP airport meet & greet, private luxury van transfer, Shibuya Scramble trail
Evening Experience: Family welcome dinner at upscale Izakaya restaurant
Overnight Stay: Tokyo City Centre (Premium Family-Friendly Luxury Hotel)
Meals Included: Traditional Japanese Welcome Dinner

days.title: Historic Asakusa & Private Sushi Masterclass
days.description: Visit Senso-ji Temple in Asakusa and Nakamise craft street. Private family sushi-making masterclass with expert Japanese chef. TeamLab Planets digital art experience.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Senso-ji Temple guided tour, TeamLab Planets entry passes
Special Curation: Private family sushi-making masterclass and premium lunch
Overnight Stay: Tokyo City Centre (Premium Family-Friendly Luxury Hotel)
Meals Included: International Breakfast & Private Masterclass Sushi Lunch

days.title: Mt. Fuji Spectacular Landscapes & Hakone Cruise
days.description: Drive to Mt. Fuji Subaru 5th Station. Scenic cruise on Lake Ashi aboard historic pirate ship. TRAGUIN luggage forwarding to Kyoto.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Mt. Fuji 5th Station, Lake Ashi cruise, Hakone Komagatake Ropeway
Logistics Highlight: Hotel-to-hotel luggage forwarding to Kyoto
Overnight Stay: Hakone Onsen Resort (Premium Ryokan with Private Hot Springs)
Meals Included: International Breakfast & Traditional Kaiseki Dinner

days.title: Bullet Train Shinkansen Transit to Timeless Kyoto
days.description: First-class Shinkansen bullet train to Kyoto. Afternoon walk through historic Gion district wooden tea houses.
activities: Sightseeing Included: First-class Shinkansen ticket, Gion heritage district guided walk
Overnight Stay: Kyoto Heritage Centre (Premium Luxury Hotel)
Meals Included: International Breakfast & Gourmet Kyoto Bento Lunch

days.title: Kyoto Red Torii Gates & Golden Pavilion
days.description: Early visit to Fushimi Inari Shrine's vermilion torii gates. Afternoon at Kinkaku-ji Golden Pavilion and Arashiyama Bamboo Grove.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Fushimi Inari torii trail, Kinkaku-ji Golden Pavilion, Arashiyama Bamboo Grove
Overnight Stay: Kyoto Heritage Centre (Premium Luxury Hotel)
Meals Included: International Breakfast & Traditional Kyoto Cuisine Dinner

days.title: Osaka Castle Majesty & Dotonbori Street Gala
days.description: Private van transfer to Osaka. Tour Osaka Castle. Evening street-food exploration through neon-lit Dotonbori with grand farewell dinner.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Osaka Castle guided entry, Dotonbori culinary walking tour
Evening Experience: Grand farewell family celebration dinner
Overnight Stay: Osaka Bay / Centre (Premium Luxury Hotel)
Meals Included: International Breakfast & Dotonbori Street-Food Farewell Feast

days.title: Seamless Airport Transit & Departure
days.description: Final breakfast at premium hotel. Private luxury van to Kansai International Airport with luggage coordination.
activities: Transfers Included: Private luxury van airport departure, luggage coordination
Meals Included: International Buffet Breakfast

hotels.name: The Thousand Kyoto / Cross Osaka / similar

inclusions.text: 06 Nights in family-friendly premium luxury hotels or traditional Ryokan
Daily breakfasts, traditional Kaiseki feast, and curated specialty dinners
First-class Shinkansen bullet train tickets from Hakone/Tokyo to Kyoto
TRAGUIN seamless hotel-to-hotel luggage forwarding (1 bag per person)
Skip-the-line entries to TeamLab Planets, Kinkaku-ji, and major landmarks
Private family sushi-making masterclass with expert Japanese chef
TRAGUIN 24/7 bilingual destination managers and guest assistance hotline
International flight tickets and Japan entry visa processing fees
Personal expenses, laundry, room service, and mini-bar billing
Tipping, porterage fees, or optional sightseeing not mentioned
